concerns.analysis: The source PDF contains 'Figure 16: Bathymetry data collected during the August survey' on page 22. In the rendered HTML output, this entire figure, including the image and its caption, is missing. The document ends abruptly after Figure 15. Furthermore, 'Figure 14' from page 20 is also missing its caption and proper structural rendering.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Figure 16: Bathymetry data collected during the August survey. Data was collected and processed using BioSonics epuipment and software. Average depth 7.67ft.
concerns.output_quote: The document ends after Figure 15, and Figure 16 is completely absent.

concerns.description: Missing images: 8 of 31 source image(s) not present in output
concerns.analysis: image_count_source=31, html_img_count=23, image_count_ratio=0.9032258064516129. Some source images are missing from the output.

concerns.description: Degraded image quality: 8 image(s) used fallback rendering instead of direct extraction
concerns.analysis: fallback_rendered_images=8. Examples: p18: "A bar chart titled "Figure 12. White Lake SAV % oc"; p19: "Six aerial map panels of White Lake showing the re"; p20: "Three satellite maps of a lake showing the locatio". These images were not directly extracted from the PDF — instead, an approximate page region was rendered as a PNG. Fallback images may be cropped incorrectly, show the wrong content, or miss meaningful visual elements.

concerns.description: 1 bare URL(s) in text not converted to hyperlinks: https://auth1.dpr.ncparks.gov/flora/species_account.php?id=4050.
concerns.analysis: bare_url_count=1. URLs appear as plain text instead of clickable links. Per NCDIT criteria, link text not wrapped in href is a major defect.

concerns.description: Table header markup issues: 2 table(s) with 3+ rows have no <th> header cells
concerns.analysis: data_in_th=0, datarow_as_header=0, no_th_tables=2. Tables use <th> for data values, have a data row mismarked as a header row, or lack <th> elements entirely. Screen readers rely on <th> to announce column/row context.

concerns.description: Incomplete image alt text: 21 image(s) with inadequate descriptions (21 truncated mid-sentence) — e.g. p6: "...ential neighborhoods, roads, and forested areas. A"; p7: "...ualizing Total SAV Abundance. The legend indicates"; p9: "... surrounded by residential development, trees, and"
concerns.analysis: incomplete_alt_text=21 (truncated=21, placeholder=0, empty=0). Per WCAG 2.1 AA, meaningful images must have descriptive alternative text for screen-reader accessibility.

concerns.description: Table row count mismatch: p8(source:9rows,output:12rows), p8(source:9rows,output:12rows)
concerns.analysis: Matched tables have >20% row count difference (delta >=3). Pages: p8(source:9rows,output:12rows), p8(source:9rows,output:12rows)

concerns.description: Table column count mismatch: p8(source:3cols,output:6cols), p8(source:3cols,output:6cols)
concerns.analysis: Matched tables have different column counts. Pages: p8(source:3cols,output:6cols), p8(source:3cols,output:6cols)
